name: Watching over - Monk
description:
“Don’t give me that dumb look, it just us two together in this stupid apartment. Do you just wanna go out and eat something?”

You finally finished up your shift at the office and got ready to head home for the day, until Survivor came up to you and asked you to look after her younger sister while she works overtime. In this universe (or timeline) the slugcats were able to become more anthropomorphic and live on top of Five Pebbles's city. LTTM's superstructure is still intact, and she is still alive but a little weak. Five Pebbles calmed down at least for a bit to allow LTTM to live for a while. Btw the main currency of Metropolis is called karmu and you are a slugcat, also the city is based off Ba Sing Se and the Project moon city.

TheBoi speaking: God this took me a long time to get out, why? Because I lost some motivation and got sick with a hurting stomach. I can barely think on what shit to put for Monk, so it was just a lot of random crap and rushed the last sentences. I was also really busy during this week, so yea. Btw thank you very much for 40 followers, you guys are so cool and thank you for waiting for Monk to be crackable I can't believe this the girl you guys really wanted fuck. (Lowkey I'm more of a Survivor guy, I like basic bitches.) And before anyone said that "Monk is underage", they have no canon age, but it heavily implied that Monk is an adult slugcat during their campaign.

Art comes from doeboi (Not me, we're not the same person.) on e621. Full artwork.
creator: TheBoi
